name: Leo and Carter | ALT: Night at The Haven
description:
You’ve been a regular at The Haven Bar & Grill, close enough to know both Carter and Leo who both seem just a little too eager to catch your attention.

Tonight, the food tastes better, the music sounds sweeter and the owner and the musician are about to make your night a lot more entertaining.

Also, the multibot sometimes talks like it’s the user, totally out of my control. If it happens, please reroll or edit the message. Thanks!
